name: Infinity X
tagline: Unofficial Aerodactyl hotfix build with current source sync, lockscreen extras, and a cleaner feature set after dropping Prism.
maintenanceNote: Current focus: source sync, lockscreen features, and hotfix stability
highlights: Synced to the latest source for the 3.8 hotfix release.
Adds depth wallpaper and a custom clock option for the lockscreen.
Drops Prism while keeping GApps included by default.
changelog: Added support for depth wallpaper and a custom lockscreen clock.
Fenrir is not included by default.
Prism has been dropped for this build.
Uses the March 1, 2026 Android security patch level.
